title: Samuel Mamootil
tagline: Senior Cloud & DevOps Engineer — making infrastructure invisible so builders ship faster.
description: Samuel Mamootil — Senior Cloud & Platform Engineer, DevOps expert, and AI infrastructure specialist. 7+ years across AWS, Azure, GCP. Microsoft Azure certified. Master's student at University of Texas at Arlington. International student, OPT eligible. Expert in Terraform, Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud migration, and AI/ML infrastructure.
author: Samuel Mamootil
heroHeadline: I build cloud infrastructure that ships fast, scales quietly, and never breaks at 2 AM.
heroIntro: Bridging the gap between code and cloud. Building scalable enterprise apps and the resilient AI-driven infrastructure that powers them.
story: I enjoy making infrastructure invisible so builders can focus on what matters: shipping products, serving users, and learning faster.
My work sits at the intersection of platform engineering, DevOps automation, cloud architecture, and practical AI infrastructure — Azure Machine Learning, AWS SageMaker, and Bedrock.
This site is part portfolio, part living notebook — a place to share projects, ideas, and moments that shaped the engineer I am becoming.
strengths: Cross-cloud delivery across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Platform standardization with reusable Terraform modules
AI/ML infrastructure — SageMaker, Azure ML, Bedrock
Team leadership and enterprise cloud migration programs
